scope_summary.problem: No automated code↔spec coverage analysis. Manual review needed to find unspecced functions and orphaned spec references. Phase 1 logical rules don't traverse nested OpenRPC schemas.
scope_summary.success_criteria: 1. @spec annotation parser scans all language comment syntaxes. 2. Bidirectional coverage report: covered, uncovered_requirements, unspecced_functions, stale_annotations. 3. Daemon pre-index via DaemonClient::symbols() for public function discovery. 4. Nested schema traversal for logical rules. 5. Implementation agent prompt produces @spec annotations.

constraints: @spec token scan is language-agnostic — no per-language AST
Lens symbols via pre-built daemon index (DaemonClient::symbols)
